subject: App keeps bouncing me back to login on iPhone
body: On my iPhone in Safari I sign in, finish 2FA, and then land back on the login screen again. I tried three times and can't stay logged in long enough to check orders.

triage.reason: Frontline can provide troubleshooting steps such as clearing Safari cache/cookies or adjusting cross-site tracking settings.

result.reason: Frontline can provide troubleshooting steps such as clearing Safari cache/cookies or adjusting cross-site tracking settings.

subject: CSV export downloads blank file
body: Export to CSV completes but the downloaded file only has headers and no rows. This started today and blocks my finance handoff.

triage.reason: Fixing a blank export requires engineering investigation and code changes, which frontline support cannot perform

result.reason: Fixing a blank export requires engineering investigation and code changes, which frontline support cannot perform
